ngsmisc 0.2.0
  • Reference

Reference

wraper functions for processx::run()

sep_by_blank()

Separate a statement by white spaces

cmd_run()

Run a separated command in external process

cat_stdout()

Show stdout messages in the process output

cat_stderr()

Show stderr messages in the process output

run_cat_stderr()

Run a statement with showing stdout messages

run_cat_stdout()

Run a statement with showing stdout messages

misc functions for featureCounts

fC_read_count()

Read featureCounts read count table

fC_read_summary()

Read featureCounts read count summary

fC_rename_col()

Rename featureCounts read count table

fC_merge_tbl_li()

Merge featureCounts read count table to a tibble

fC_calc_rpm() fC_calc_rpkm() fC_calc_tpm()

Calculate RPM/RPKM/TPM from featureCounts read counts

misc functions for rMATS

rM_read_MATS_test_out()

Read rMATS output file (.MATS.JC.txt/.MATS.JCEC.txt)

misc functions for clusterProfiler

clP_write_li_ego()

Run clustreProfiler::enrichGO() and write R object of the result to a file

clP_write_li_ego_as_csv()

Write the enrichGO result to a csv file

clP_plot_bar()

Write ego result as barplot

clP_wrap_barplots()

Wrapping barplots of enrichResult-objects

clP_write_li_ego_as_bar()

Write the enrichGO result to a barplot

Calculate RPM/RPKM/TPM

calc_rpm()

Calculate Reads Per Million mapped reads (RPM)

calc_rpkm()

Calculate Reads Per Kilobase of exon per Million mappled reads (RPKM)

calc_tpm()

Calculate Transcripts Per kilobase Million (TPM)

Contents
